title: Freemann's LifeSteal
description:
So basicly it is a plugin where you lose an heart evrytime you die 
also if you were killed by a player it gives him an heart
body:
Base/Mechanics:

When a player dies, they lose a heart.

If player 1 kills player 2,
player 1 gains a heart while player 2 loses one.

You can obtain the heart item by withdrawing hearts. Type /withdraw in the chat to do so. You can regain a heart by right-clicking on it.

You can craft a heart by following the recipe in the gallery.

Reviving a player with no hearts will be available soon.

Commands:

Withdraw: Removes a heart from yourself and gives you the item.
Giveheart (for ops): Grants you the heart item.

Cosmetics:

When a player dies, lightning strikes where they died.
If it was their last heart, a wither spawning sound plays
(And a beautiful message is broadcasted in the chat).
